economic_mechanism: High-yield credit may reprice deteriorating risk appetite and financing conditions before large-cap equities fully adjust; the primary test asked whether a ten-session HYG-minus-IEF risk-off divergence inside a still-positive SPY long trend leads five-session SPY downside.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact claim-bearing CREDIT_RISK_OFF_SPY_BEAR_PUT_21D_V1 / HIGH_YIELD_CREDIT_DIVERGENCE_FORWARD_DOWNSIDE on the exact-date adjusted SPY/HYG/IEF panel: SPY above warmed SMA100, ten-session HYG-minus-IEF return <= -1.5 percentage points, SPY five-session return <= 0, next-close entry, fifth-subsequent-close exit, prior-only same-regime controls, chronological 60/40 train/sealed holdout, and zero option pricing. Future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide SPY bear-put debit spread only: capital_fit_usd=200, frictionless planning max_loss_usd=200 before debit/closing friction, max_lots=1. Independent OVERNIGHT_SELL_INTRADAY_RECOVERY_SPY_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 is search information only.
falsifier: Close the primary exact family unless train has at least 36 matched pairs across at least eight signal years, prior-control support at least 80%, signed event mean after 10 bps > 0, signed paired excess > 0, circular three-pair-block LB90 > 0, signed positive frequency at least 55%, signed worst-decile mean at least -5%, and zero chronology, lag, reuse, population, or nonfinite violations; holdout outcomes and option pricing must remain unopened.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact credit-risk-off primary remains F0 and is closed. In 41 matched train pairs across ten years, signed bearish event mean after 10 bps was -0.909825%, signed prior-control mean -0.201659%, paired excess -0.708167%, LB90 -1.360006%, and signed hit rate 29.2683%; four frozen gates failed. No F1/F2/L1, living candidate, quality leader, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority was earned.

search_information.summary: The wake added and exercised a reusable two-mechanism train-only candidate factory, repaired machine-close adjusted-OHLCV cache geometry validation, preserved sealed holdouts and zero option pricing, found a strong wrong-sign credit anti-edge, and left the overnight/intraday screen unadvanced because n32<36 and LB90=-0.200722%. Long prior-control distances are explicit diagnostics: primary median/max 153/680 sessions; secondary 155.5/723 sessions. The successor search epoch now has two counted no-advance decisions and requires a materially different evidence-class pivot.

useful_deltas.summary: Added an executable train-only multi-mechanism factory with completed-session features, next-close/five-session chronology, non-overlapping signals, deterministic prior-only no-reuse controls, frozen gate/ranking logic, strict JSON, identity-only holdouts, and explicit one-lot planning bounds; tests cover lag, prior controls, positive and wrong-sign outcomes, sealed holdouts, and failure-label boundaries.

Adjusted-OHLCV validation now accepts only machine-close CSV round-trip equality at rtol=atol=1e-12 while material high/open/close or low/open/close violations still fail closed; the dependent factory was rerun unchanged and its machine dominant-failure text now names only the four actual failed gates.

Closed both stable IDs for the exact credit-risk-off geometry after four frozen train failures: wrong signed event expectancy, negative paired specificity, non-positive dependence-aware LB90, and 29.2683% signed hit rate. Density, years, support, tail, and integrity passed but cannot rescue the anti-edge; the 28-pair holdout remains unread and pricing stays zero.

Registered the post-reassessment successor epoch beginning at 0335, counted the 0335 and 0408 closes as two consecutive no-advance decisions, set strategy_pivot_required=true and burst-stop=false, quarantined credit and overnight same-panel salvage, and constrained the sole Form 4 NEXT to an exercised same-wake F0 advance-or-close rather than capability-only EDGAR scaffolding.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve the exact credit-family close. Reopening requires a materially different credit-state construction or horizon justified before outcomes, point-in-time credit-spread evidence, or another independent evidence class rather than same-panel threshold/option-wrapper salvage.

The parked overnight/intraday screen requires a new predeclared mechanism or materially stronger independent evidence design; its sealed holdout cannot be opened and its current thresholds cannot be tuned from inspected train outcomes.

The Form 4 pivot requires official SEC filing timestamps, transaction/amendment/ownership fields, issuer mapping, and enough cross-symbol/year density to exercise a named F0 train decision; capability-only collection is insufficient.

no_advance_context.reason: The 0335 sector-leader close and 0408 credit-risk-off close are the two counted decisions in the registered successor search epoch; the completed 0112 FOMC epoch remains bounded historical context.

next: SEC_FORM4_CLUSTERED_INSIDER_BUYING_DIRECTION_F0: pivot to official point-in-time corporate-information evidence. Before outcome access freeze a fixed liquid multi-symbol panel, open-market Form 4 transaction-code/direct-indirect ownership/amendment/issuer/timestamp rules, cluster threshold, prior-only same-symbol no-reuse controls with max/median distance diagnostics, signed five- or ten-session horizon, complete one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide call-debit Layered Edge Stack with capital_fit_usd=200, planning max_loss_usd=200 before debit/closing friction, max_lots=1, and exact train advance-or-close gates. Exercise one named F0->F1 STRATEGY_ADVANCED or FAMILY_CLOSED decision in the same wake; fail closed on derivatives, late/non-PIT filings, issuer mapping, reversing amendments, or insufficient cross-symbol/year density. Do not inspect this wake's sealed holdouts or retune its credit/overnight screens.
